gov.nist.core
クラス StringTokenizer

java.lang.Object
  gov.nist.core.StringTokenizer
直系の既知のサブクラス:
LexerCore
public class StringTokenizer
extends java.lang.Object

Base string token splitter.

バージョン:
JAIN-SIP-1.1
作成者:
M. Ranganathan
This code is in the public domain.

          Get a Vector of the buffer tokenized by lines
